creator: atkin901@gmail.com
text:
This updates xf86-video-ati to v6.13.2.   This should supercede the v6.13.1 update (ports/148712).   Several people in the x11 mailing list have reported no problems and success with this version.   Personally it fixes the annoying scroll glitch in v6.13.0 and have been running it for many weeks without error.

It does not fix the load/unload error on some chipsets, which will still require a reboot upon exiting xorg.   That appears to be a kernel level issue.

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
